about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Software Developer at VakıfBank developing corporate banking systems
about.description: Currently working as a Software Developer at VakıfBank. Previously held a Full Stack Developer position at Anssoft. Expert in .NET Core, Angular, SQL Server, Docker, and CI/CD technologies. I develop secure, performant, and scalable financial applications at the enterprise level. I value clean code principles, SOLID principles, and best practices. Proficient in Agile methodology and team collaboration.
